summary: Both features tested and working: 1) FILTERS - Homepage budget categories navigate to /inventory with correct URL params (priceRange, transmission, bodyType). InventoryPage reads params and applies filters correctly. Clear all button resets filters and URL. 2) FAMILIES CATERED - GET/POST/DELETE endpoints working. Admin Dashboard has 'Families Catered' tab with image grid. Homepage shows auto-scrolling carousel with 8+ images.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cars returns cars with transmission, price, body_type fields
Backend: GET /api/cars?featured=true returns featured cars
Backend: GET /api/family-deliveries returns list of images (public)
Backend: GET /api/family-deliveries?limit=5 respects limit
Backend: POST /api/family-deliveries requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/family-deliveries with auth creates image
Backend: DELETE /api/family-deliveries requires authentication (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/family-deliveries/{id} with auth deletes image
Backend: DELETE /api/family-deliveries/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: Admin login works with admin@truvant.com / Admin@123
Frontend: Homepage has 5 budget filter buttons with data-testid
Frontend: 'Under ₹5 Lakh' navigates to /inventory?priceRange=0-500000
Frontend: 'Automatic Cars' navigates to /inventory?transmission=Automatic
Frontend: 'SUV Under Budget' navigates to /inventory?bodyType=SUV
Frontend: InventoryPage reads URL params and sets filter dropdowns
Frontend: transmission=Automatic shows 8 vehicles
Frontend: priceRange=0-500000 shows 1 vehicle (Skoda Superb)
Frontend: transmission=Manual shows 3 vehicles
Frontend: Clear all button resets filters and clears URL params
Frontend: Filter dropdown changes update URL params
Frontend: Families Catered carousel visible on homepage
Frontend: Carousel has 24 images (8 original × 3 for infinite scroll)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has 'Families Catered' tab
Frontend: Admin can add new family delivery image
Frontend: Admin sees image count (8 Total Images in Carousel)
Frontend: Add Image modal has URL input, caption input, preview
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js: handleFilterClick() correctly builds URLSearchParams and navigates to /inventory
HomePage.js: budgetCategories array defines filter mappings (priceRange, transmission, bodyType)
InventoryPage.js: useSearchParams hook reads URL params on mount
InventoryPage.js: updateFilter() updates both state and URL params
InventoryPage.js: clearFilters() resets state and calls setSearchParams({})
InventoryPage.js: applyFilters() correctly filters by priceRange (min-max), transmission, bodyType
FamiliesCarousel.js: Fetches from /api/family-deliveries and renders auto-scrolling carousel
FamiliesCarousel.js: Duplicates images 3x for seamless infinite scroll
AdminFamilies.js: CRUD operations for family deliveries with auth token
server.py: FamilyDelivery model with id, image_url, caption, created_at
seed_data_creation: 8 family delivery images already seeded. Test created and deleted 1 test image during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features fully implemented and tested: 1) Filter system - HomePage budget categories pass URL params to /inventory. InventoryPage reads params with useSearchParams and applies filters. 2) Families Catered - MongoDB collection 'family_deliveries', API endpoints, AdminFamilies component, FamiliesCarousel auto-scrolling component. 8 sample images loaded. Note: No cars exist under 3 Lakh in test data, so that filter shows 0 results (expected).

issue_1_filters.original_problem: Budget filters, transmission, SUV filters on homepage not filtering cars properly
issue_1_filters.root_cause: HomePage was not passing URL params when navigating to /inventory. InventoryPage was not reading URL params to set initial filter state.
issue_1_filters.fix_applied: 1) HomePage.handleFilterClick() builds URLSearchParams from category.filter object. 2) InventoryPage uses useSearchParams hook to read params on mount. 3) updateFilter() updates both state and URL. 4) clearFilters() resets state and clears URL params.
issue_1_filters.verification: Tested all 5 budget categories - all navigate with correct params. Filter dropdowns populate from URL. Clear all works.

issue_2_families.original_problem: Need admin functionality to upload images and create auto-scrolling carousel for 'Families Catered So Far' section
issue_2_families.fix_applied: 1) Created FamilyDelivery model in server.py. 2) Added GET/POST/DELETE endpoints for /api/family-deliveries. 3) Created AdminFamilies.js component with image grid and add modal. 4) Created FamiliesCarousel.js with auto-scrolling animation. 5) Added 'families' tab to AdminDashboard.js.
issue_2_families.verification: Backend API tests pass. Admin can add/delete images. Homepage shows carousel with 8+ images and auto-scroll animation.
